posts.text:
The rupee’s weakness is caused by many factors, only some to do with domestic policy. So why hold whoever is in power responsible for a weak rupee?

To learn the history of India’s anxiety over its currency, register to read the full story (it’s free) https://www.economist.com/asia/2026/04/05/the-tumbling-rupee-is-a-big-problem-for-narendra-modi?taid=69d3473772732b0001382aed&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
